Name: Dragon Roll
Description: Shrimp tempura inside topped with sliced avocado and eel, drizzled with sweet unagi sauce and sesame seeds. A legendary roll that never disappoints.

Name: Rainbow Roll
Description: A California Roll draped in a colorful array of fresh salmon, tuna, yellowtail, shrimp, and avocado. Almost too beautiful to eat — almost.

Name: Volcano Roll
Description: Crab and avocado roll baked with a fiery spicy mayo and tobiko topping that erupts with flavor in every bite.

Name: Spicy Tuna Crunch
Description: Fresh spicy tuna and cucumber wrapped in soy paper, finished with crispy tempura flakes for the perfect crunch.

Name: Mango Tango Roll
Description: A tropical twist with fresh mango, shrimp tempura, and cream cheese, topped with mango slices and a tangy citrus glaze.

Name: GoGo Special Roll
Description: Our house masterpiece — lobster tempura, spicy crab, avocado, and jalapeño, topped with seared torch salmon and truffle drizzle. The roll that put us on the map.

Name: California Roll
Description: The timeless crowd-pleaser with real crab, creamy avocado, and crisp cucumber wrapped in seasoned sushi rice and nori.

Name: Spicy Salmon Roll
Description: Buttery salmon mixed with our house spicy mayo and scallions, delivering a rich kick with every slice.

Name: Shrimp Tempura Roll
Description: Golden crispy shrimp tempura paired with avocado and cucumber, finished with a drizzle of eel sauce. Crunch lovers rejoice.

Name: Avocado Roll
Description: Simple, clean, and satisfying — perfectly ripe avocado rolled in seasoned rice and nori. A plant-based favorite.

Name: Philly Roll
Description: Silky smoked salmon and velvety cream cheese with cucumber, delivering East Coast deli vibes in sushi form.

Name: Salmon Poke Bowl
Description: Fresh cubed salmon over warm sushi rice with edamame, cucumber, avocado, seaweed salad, and our signature sesame-soy poke sauce.

Name: Chicken Teriyaki Bowl
Description: Juicy grilled chicken glazed in our house-made teriyaki, served over steamed rice with stir-fried veggies and a side of pickled ginger.

Name: Veggie Rice Bowl
Description: A garden-fresh bowl loaded with avocado, cucumber, pickled radish, edamame, carrots, and tofu over sushi rice with ponzu dressing.

Name: Edamame
Description: Steamed young soybeans tossed in sea salt — the perfect warm-up snack while you wait for your rolls.

Name: Miso Soup
Description: A comforting bowl of dashi broth with silken tofu, wakame seaweed, and sliced scallions. Authentic and soul-warming.

Name: Gyoza (6pc)
Description: Six pan-fried pork and vegetable dumplings with crispy golden bottoms, served with house-made ponzu dipping sauce.

Name: Seaweed Salad
Description: Chilled marinated wakame seaweed with a sesame-citrus dressing, garnished with sesame seeds and a hint of chili.

Name: Ramune Soda
Description: The iconic Japanese marble soda — pop the top for a fizzy burst of fun. Available in original lemon-lime flavor.

Name: Iced Matcha Latte
Description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked smooth and poured over ice with your choice of milk. Creamy, earthy, and energizing.

Name: Green Tea
Description: A hot cup of traditional Japanese green tea — light, refreshing, and the perfect palate cleanser between courses.

Name: Calpico
Description: A beloved Japanese yogurt-flavored soft drink with a light, tangy sweetness. Refreshingly smooth and slightly creamy.
